name: prop-hunt
description: Skeleton multiplayer prop hunt — static site (Cloudflare Pages), P2P WebRTC between browsers via PeerJS's free public broker. No server, no build step.
_devDependencies_note: three + @dimforge/rapier3d-compat are ONLY for the offline authoring checks under tools/ (check-hunter-model-size.mjs loads the real GLB with GLTFLoader and runs the SAME sizing code the game ships; check-combat.mjs / check-physics-live.mjs stand up the REAL Rapier PhysicsWorld to verify shot hitboxes + collision). The GAME never uses node_modules — it imports three + Rapier from CDN at runtime. Both pinned to the app's versions (three 0.161.0, rapier 0.14.0) so the checks match what ships.
